name: neighborhood-starter
purpose: The canonical starter pack for planting a new RAPP neighborhood. Two files: factory_agent.py (drops into your local brainstem; the meta-agent that plants neighborhoods) + neighborhood-starter.egg (the template content, parameterized for the user's choices). Supports four modes: local-only on-device, GitHub-private, GitHub-public, or fresh portable .egg.

factory_agent.py.purpose: Drop into local brainstem agents/. Run NeighborhoodFactory to plant.

neighborhood-starter.egg.purpose: Template content. The factory pulls + customizes this at plant time.
